characters.appearance: Male in his 20s, slim build, light brown complexion, short black hair, clean-shaven. He has a friendly and approachable face.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: YouTube videos, A tier. [YouTube videos, A tier.]
Character A says: It's where everyone starts out, and honestly listening practice के लिए it still holds up. [It's where everyone starts out, and honestly for listening practice it still holds up.]
Character A says: Content बहुत अच्छा है, but problem ये है कि you only listen, you don't actually practice speaking. [The content is very good, but the problem is that you only listen, you don't actually practice speaking.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a familiar tier-list format.
- Establishes a common starting point (YouTube) and validates it.
- Introduces the core problem: passive listening doesn't equal speaking practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Offline Coaching. Now I'm gonna put this in B tier and I know people are gonna argue with me here. [Offline Coaching. Now I'm gonna put this in B tier and I know people are gonna argue with me here.]
Character A says: Environment बहुत अच्छा होता है, but if you are a working professional, it takes too much time and gets expensive really fast. [The environment is very good, but if you are a working professional, it takes too much time and gets expensive really fast.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses a traditional, highly respected method (offline coaching).
- Validates its usefulness but highlights the friction points for the target audience (time and money).
- Builds trust by being realistic about working professionals' constraints.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova App, S tier, and it's not even close. [Supernova App, S tier, and it's not even close.]
Character A says: This one actually changed how people learn more than any other method on this list. [This one actually changed how people learn more than any other method on this list.]
Character A says: You just open the app and practice speaking with an AI tutor in real-world situations—like an interview, a shop, or with a client. [You just open the app and practice speaking with an AI tutor in real-world situations—like an interview, a shop, or with a client.]
Character A says: It basically removes the fear of speaking. [It basically removes the fear of speaking.]
Character A says: If you want to speak fluent English, you should be on this right now. [If you want to speak fluent English, you should be on this right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the ultimate 'S-tier' solution.
- Highlights core features: AI tutor and real-world speaking situations.
- Focuses on the emotional payoff: removing the fear of speaking.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Grammar Books, I'm gonna put this in C tier. [Grammar Books, I'm gonna put this in C tier.]
Character A says: Like yeah, rules important हैं, everyone buys them, but every single person I know has read them three times and they still hesitate to speak. [Like yeah, rules are important, everyone buys them, but every single person I know has read them three times and they still hesitate to speak.]
Character A says: Give me 10 minutes of daily speaking practice any day. [Give me 10 minutes of daily speaking practice any day.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Critiques a common but ineffective method (rote grammar learning).
- Relates to the shared frustration of knowing the rules but still hesitating to speak.
- Reinforces Supernova's philosophy: daily speaking practice beats theory.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: The one on this list that most learners haven't tried yet is Supernova. [The one on this list that most learners haven't tried yet is Supernova.]
Character A says: Download the app and start speaking today. [Download the app and start speaking today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct Call to Action.
- Ties back to the curiosity hook from the beginning ('most haven't tried').
- Encourages immediate action without making false 'free' promises.
